title: NYCdb
description: Database tool for NYC housing data, making it accessible for tenant advocates and researchers.

title: Councilmatic
description: Track city council legislation and keep tabs on local government activities in NYC.

title: Access-A-Ride
description: Tools and analysis for improving paratransit services for New Yorkers with disabilities.

title: Civic Data Design Lab
description: Open source tools from MIT for visualizing and analyzing urban data to inform civic action.

title: OpenElections
description: Collecting and standardizing election results data across the United States.

title: CitySDK
description: A toolkit by the U.S. Census Bureau for building civic data applications using Census APIs.
